title: abutilon aureum
intro: Abutilon aureum, also known as the golden abutilon, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Abutilon aureum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Abutilon aureum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
